title: Kristu jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time table 2026 OUT

detail.title: Kristu jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Kristu Jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time Table 2026 for II and IV Semester UG End Semester Theory Examinations April May 2026. Download official timetable PDF here

sections.heading: Kristu jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time table 2026 OUT

content.text: Kristu Jayanti University has published the BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time Table 2026 for II and IV Semester School of Law students on its official website https://www.kristujayanti.edu.in. The time table covers the April/May 2026 End Semester Theory Examinations with detailed dates, sessions, course codes and subject names.

Students of BA LLB, BBA LLB and BCom LLB (H) can now check their complete exam date sheet online and plan their preparation according to the official schedule. To view the time table, candidates must visit the university website, open the examination notification section and download the published PDF for the respective semester and course.

To access the detailed time table, students may be required to select their programme details and then open the relevant PDF file. After downloading the schedule, all candidates are advised to carefully verify the exam dates, paper titles, timings and instructions, and in case of any discrepancy, immediately contact the university examination branch or the Controller of Examinations.
Download the Kristu Jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time Table 2026 PDF here

links.text: Download the Kristu Jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time Table 2026 PDF here

sections.heading: Kristu jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time table 2026 Overview

content.text: The Kristu Jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time Table 2026 provides a complete schedule for II and IV Semester School of Law students for the April/May 2026 End Semester Theory Examinations. This overview helps candidates quickly understand key details such as session, dates, course codes and official site for reference.

sections.heading: Kristu jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The Kristu Jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time Table 2026 gives a clear subject-wise schedule for II and IV Semester School of Law students. Each subject is listed with its corresponding date, session and course code, helping students to organize their study plan according to the official exam sequence.

The April/May 2026 End Semester Theory Examination dates are allotted across multiple days for various BA LLB, BBA LLB and BCom LLB (H) subjects, including core law papers, allied subjects and skill-based courses. Students must go through the subject-wise timetable carefully so that they do not miss any paper and can prepare systematically before the exams commence.
Below is a subject wise snapshot of the main papers and their scheduled dates as per the official School of Law time table for 2026.
BA / BBA / BCom. LLB II Semester Time table 2026

rows: Political Science II: Comparative Government and Politics

content.text: BA / BBA / BCom. LLB IV Semester Time table 2026

rows: Criminal Law I: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023

sections.heading: How to Download Kristu jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time table 2026

content.text: Students can download the Kristu Jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time Table 2026 directly from the official university website. Follow the simple steps given below to access and save the exam schedule for your reference.

items: Visit the official website of Kristu Jayanti University by opening kristujayanti.edu.in in your browser.
On the home page, locate and click on the "Examination" or "Examinations" section available in the main menu or notification area.
In the examination section, search for the latest notification link related to "School of Law II / IV Sem UG End Semester Theory Examination Time Table April / May 2026" for BA, BBA, BCom LLB.
Click on the relevant time table link for your course and semester to open the official PDF file.
Once the Kristu jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time table 2026 PDF opens, review the complete schedule displayed on the screen.
Download the PDF by using the download icon or the save option in your browser and store it on your device.
If needed, take a printout of the downloaded time table so that you can easily check the exam dates and plan your preparation.

content.text: After downloading the official timetable, students are advised to go through the dates, timings and subject details carefully and keep a printed or saved copy handy for smooth exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Kristu jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time table 2026

content.text: The Kristu jayanti University BA, BBA, BCom and LLB Time table 2026 contains all the essential information required for School of Law students appearing in the April/May 2026 UG End Semester Theory Examinations. Candidates should carefully verify each detail mentioned in the timetable to avoid any confusion during the exam period.

items: Name of the University
Name of the School (School of Law)
Programme name (BA LLB (H), BBA LLB (H), BCom LLB (H))
Semester (II Semester / IV Semester)
Title of the examination (UG End Semester Theory Examination April / May 2026)
Exam month and year
Exam session (Forenoon AM / Afternoon PM)
Exam timings (start time for AM and PM sessions)
Exam date for each paper
Course code for each subject
Full subject name for each course code
Important instructions for students regarding eligibility and hall tickets
Note on issue of hall tickets to eligible students only
Signature or name/designation of the Controller of Examinations
Any additional remarks or special notes mentioned in the schedule
